name: Notifikasi Stok - Konfigurasi Threshold, Toggle Notifikasi, Simpan
description: Test konfigurasi notifikasi stok: lihat panel notifikasi, ubah threshold minimum, toggle aktif/nonaktif, simpan. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Click Notifikasi Stok menu in the sidebar
Notifikasi Stok configuration panel is visible
Toggle the notification enable/disable switch if available
Find and modify a threshold or minimum stock value input field
Input field accepts the new value
Click the Simpan or Save button to save notification settings
Settings are saved and success message or confirmation is shown
